message:
feat(daemon): wire dashboard with auth middleware

Replace placeholder HTTP handler with real dashboard server wrapped in
auth middleware. The daemon now serves the web dashboard on the configured
HTTP port with Tailscale-based authentication (passing nil for now until
DaemonAPI is implemented on Daemon).

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
